final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic editorial screenshot of a TikTok (抖音) live stream featuring the celebrity 神仙姐姐 (Liu Yifei), in a 9:16 vertical mobile format.

Style/medium: photorealistic mobile screenshot simulation, mimicking an authentic 抖音 live broadcast UI with on-screen overlays, viewer count, and live chat bubbles
Composition: vertical 9:16 frame, medium close-up shot of the host from chest up, centered subject, front-facing camera angle
Subject: 神仙姐姐 (Liu Yifei), elegant appearance, holding up a handwritten or printed sign with both hands at chest level; sign reads "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Scene/backdrop: softly lit indoor live-stream studio or bedroom setup, blurred background with warm ambient lighting
Lighting/mood: soft ring-light frontal illumination, warm and inviting tone, intimate live-stream atmosphere
Color palette: warm skin tones as anchor, soft neutral background, 抖音 signature red/white UI elements as accent
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the subject; 抖音 live stream UI overlay elements (viewer count, hearts, chat messages) in the frame
Constraints: must look like a genuine 抖音 live stream screenshot with authentic UI chrome (top bar showing "直播中", floating heart animations, scrolling comment bar at bottom); sign text must be clearly legible
Avoid: blurry or illegible sign text, deformed hands, generic stock-photo look, missing UI overlay elements, over-smoothed skin
